articles.title: Hegseth blasts Brits, says Iran's chaotic retaliation has driven its own allies 'into the American orbit' - Fox News
articles.description: War Secretary Hegseth says Iran's strikes on Gulf neighbors backfired, driving regional allies into the U.S. orbit as CENTCOM prepares a major firepower surge.
articles.content: War Secretary Pete Hegseth said Wednesday that Irans decision to strike neighboring countries has backfired strategically, driving Gulf states that had hoped to stay out of the conflict "into the Ame… [+4553 chars]
